structured_payload_candidate.title: Control Sequence Requirements
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Control submittals must include a brief overview narrative, interactions with other systems, delineation of localized controls and BAS points, operating modes, capacity control sequences, initial and recommended values for adjustable settings, rough zone analysis, energy mapping, and system override capabilities.
